subcodes.first_line: O Lord! O Thou Who graciously aidest whomsoever Thou willest, with whatsoever Thou willest, unto whatsoever Thou willest. Verily, that treasury of resignation
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا موید من یشاء بما یشاء علی ما یشاء ان معدن الرضا و منبع الوفا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for martyrs, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom
